name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: NTDS Exfiltration Command
notes:
This Building Block detects a command used by conti to exfiltrate NTDS.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Max Altgelt, Tobias Michalski
SIGMA Title: Conti NTDS Exfiltration Command
SIGMA Description: Detects a command used by conti to exfiltrate NTDS


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: NTDS Exfiltration Command on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%7za.exe%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\\c$\\temp\\log.zip%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: NTDS Exfiltration Command on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command")  LIKE '%7za.exe%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\\c$\\temp\\log.zip%' AQL filter query
